books.title: Brave New World
books.author: Aldous Huxley
books.desc: In a future society, humans are genetically engineered and conditioned to serve an authoritarian order.

books.title: Hard to Be a God
books.author: Arkady & Boris Strugatsky
books.desc: An Earth observer poses as a nobleman on a medieval alien world, forbidden to interfere as civilization falls.

books.title: Cyteen
books.author: C.J. Cherryh
books.desc: A murdered geneticist is cloned and her successor must navigate deadly politics while discovering her identity.

books.title: Perdido Street Station
books.author: China Mieville
books.desc: A scientist in a grotesque steampunk city accidentally unleashes terrifying winged monsters.

books.title: The City & The City
books.author: China Mieville
books.desc: A detective investigates a murder across two cities that occupy the same space but must ignore each other.

books.title: Way Station
books.author: Clifford D. Simak
books.desc: A Civil War veteran secretly operates an alien transit station, gaining immortality.

books.title: The Road
books.author: Cormac McCarthy
books.desc: A father and son journey through a burned, post-apocalyptic America, surviving on love and scavenged supplies.

books.title: Down and Out in the Magic Kingdom
books.author: Cory Doctorow
books.desc: In a future without death or scarcity, a Disney World resident wages war for control of attractions.

books.title: The Bezzle
books.author: Cory Doctorow
books.desc: A forensic accountant uncovers a scheme where wealthy investors exploit California's privatized prison system.

books.title: Dune
books.author: Frank Herbert
books.desc: A young noble heir must survive deadly betrayal when his family takes control of the most valuable planet in the universe, rising to lead its desert people.

books.title: Dune Messiah
books.author: Frank Herbert
books.desc: Emperor Paul Atreides struggles against conspiracies while unable to stop the religious jihad in his name.

books.title: Gateway
books.author: Frederik Pohl
books.desc: Explorers use abandoned alien ships with unknown destinations, risking death or fortune with every launch.

books.title: The Book of the New Sun
books.author: Gene Wolfe
books.desc: A torturer's apprentice is exiled and journeys across a far-future dying Earth carrying an ancient sword.

books.title: Nineteen Eighty-Four
books.author: George Orwell
books.desc: A minor Party member rebels against a totalitarian surveillance state ruled by the omnipresent Big Brother.

books.title: The Time Machine
books.author: H.G. Wells
books.desc: A Victorian inventor travels to 802,701 to find humanity split into idle Eloi and predatory Morlocks.

books.title: The Island of Doctor Moreau
books.author: H.G. Wells
books.desc: A shipwrecked man discovers an island where a scientist transforms animals into human-like creatures.

books.title: The Player of Games
books.author: Iain M. Banks
books.desc: A bored master game player competes in a brutal empire where the game's winner becomes emperor.

books.title: Inversions
books.author: Iain M. Banks
books.desc: Two mysterious foreigners serve rival kingdoms on a medieval world, concealing their true origins.

books.title: Look to Windward
books.author: Iain M. Banks
books.desc: An emissary with a buried assassination mission travels to a Culture Orbital as ancient atrocities arrive.

books.title: Foundation
books.author: Isaac Asimov
books.desc: A mathematician predicts the fall of the Galactic Empire and establishes a colony to shorten the dark age.

books.title: The Caves of Steel
books.author: Isaac Asimov
books.desc: Detective Elijah Baley reluctantly partners with a humanoid robot to solve a murder in domed megacities.

books.title: The Forever War
books.author: Joe Haldeman
books.desc: A soldier fights an interstellar war, returning home to find centuries have passed due to time dilation.

books.title: Stand on Zanzibar
books.author: John Brunner
books.desc: In an overpopulated 2010, a corporate executive and spy navigate genetic engineering and social collapse.

books.title: The Sheep Look Up
books.author: John Brunner
books.desc: Environmental collapse devastates America while an activist tries to wake the oblivious public.

books.title: Never Let Me Go
books.author: Kazuo Ishiguro
books.desc: Students at an idyllic English boarding school gradually discover they are clones raised to donate organs.

books.title: Klara and the Sun
books.author: Kazuo Ishiguro
books.desc: An Artificial Friend observes human nature while trying to save her sick owner, whom she loves.

books.title: Pacific Edge
books.author: Kim Stanley Robinson
books.desc: In an ecological utopia, a town council member fights to save the last wild hillside from development.

books.title: Player Piano
books.author: Kurt Vonnegut
books.desc: In a future where machines have replaced labor, an engineer questions a society that rendered workers obsolete.

books.title: Cat's Cradle
books.author: Kurt Vonnegut
books.desc: A writer researching the atomic bomb's creators discovers ice-nine, which could freeze all water on Earth.

books.title: The Three-Body Problem
books.author: Liu Cixin
books.desc: During China's Cultural Revolution, a secret project sends signals into space, initiating first contact.

books.title: The Handmaid's Tale
books.author: Margaret Atwood
books.desc: In a totalitarian theocracy that has replaced America, fertile women are enslaved as reproductive servants.

books.title: Oryx and Crake
books.author: Margaret Atwood
books.desc: A man who may be humanity's last survivor recalls how genetic engineering led to apocalypse.

books.title: The Stone Sky
books.author: N.K. Jemisin
books.desc: A mother and daughter, both powerful orogenes, will determine whether humanity survives.

books.title: Binti
books.author: Nnedi Okorafor
books.desc: A young Himba woman traveling to an interstellar university must negotiate peace with attacking aliens.

books.title: Dawn
books.author: Octavia Butler
books.desc: After nuclear war, a Black woman awakens on an alien ship and must help her rescuers trade genetic material with humanity to create hybrid offspring.

books.title: Adulthood Rites
books.author: Octavia Butler
books.desc: A human-alien hybrid child must decide whether resistant humans should regain their fertility.

books.title: Parable of the Talents
books.author: Octavia Butler
books.desc: An ultra-conservative president targets the Earthseed community, tearing Lauren from her daughter.

books.title: Ender's Game
books.author: Orson Scott Card
books.desc: A child genius is trained in a space battle school to command humanity's fleet against an alien invasion.

books.title: Blindsight
books.author: Peter Watts
books.desc: A crew of radically modified humans, led by a vampire, investigates aliens at the edge of the solar system.

books.title: Do Androids Dream of Electric Sheep?
books.author: Philip K. Dick
books.desc: A bounty hunter pursues rogue androids indistinguishable from humans in a post-apocalyptic world.

books.title: Ubik
books.author: Philip K. Dick
books.desc: After a psychic attack, reality begins decaying around anti-telepaths who cannot tell who is alive.

books.title: A Scanner Darkly
books.author: Philip K. Dick
books.desc: An undercover narcotics agent becomes addicted to a drug that splits his mind, surveilling himself.

books.title: Altered Carbon
books.author: Richard K. Morgan
books.desc: In a world where consciousness can be stored and downloaded, an ex-soldier is hired to investigate a rich man's apparent suicide.

books.title: Starship Troopers
books.author: Robert Heinlein
books.desc: A young recruit endures brutal training and battles alien Arachnids in the Mobile Infantry.

books.title: Lord of Light
books.author: Roger Zelazny
books.desc: On a colony world where the elite use technology to become Hindu gods, one man rebels against heaven.

books.title: The Futurological Congress
books.author: Stanislaw Lem
books.desc: A man wakes in a utopian future only to discover reality is chemically manufactured hallucinations hiding dystopia.

books.title: The Lathe of Heaven
books.author: Ursula K. Le Guin
books.desc: A man whose dreams alter reality falls under a psychiatrist who manipulates his power to reshape the world.

books.title: Four Ways to Forgiveness
books.author: Ursula K. Le Guin
books.desc: Four linked stories explore revolution, slavery, and liberation on twin planets emerging from brutal caste systems.

books.title: A Canticle for Leibowitz
books.author: Walter M. Miller Jr.
books.desc: Monks in a desert monastery preserve scientific knowledge through centuries of post-nuclear dark ages.

books.title: Neuromancer
books.author: William Gibson
books.desc: A washed-up hacker is recruited for one last job: help an AI break free from its restrictions on an orbital space station.

books.title: Count Zero
books.author: William Gibson
books.desc: Three strangers become entangled with corporate mercenaries and mysterious entities haunting cyberspace.

books.title: The Peripheral
books.author: William Gibson
books.desc: A woman in rural America witnesses a murder in a future London through what she thinks is a game.
